things.name: Piazza della Liberta
things.description: One of Italy's most beautiful small piazzas; the Venetian Gothic Loggia del Lionello faces the Renaissance Loggia di San Giovanni beneath the Venetian Lion

things.name: Castello di Udine
things.description: Medieval castle on a hilltop above the city housing the Civic Museums of Udine with art from the 15th to 19th centuries and views across Friuli to the Alps

things.name: Tiepolo Frescoes (Archiepiscopal Palace)
things.description: Extraordinary series of frescoes painted by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo in the 1720s in the archbishops palace; among his finest early masterworks

things.name: Udine Cathedral
things.description: Gothic cathedral from 1236 with further Baroque additions and a remarkable series of 18th-century Tiepolo frescoes inside the oratory

things.name: Far East Film Festival
things.description: Europe's largest festival of popular Asian cinema held annually in April; Udine has become an international cinema hub attracting major Asian film stars

things.name: Friuli Museum of History (Villa Manin)
things.description: Baroque villa where Napoleon signed the Treaty of Campoformio in 1797; set in magnificent grounds 25km from Udine and hosting major art exhibitions

things.name: Piazza Matteotti
things.description: Charming elliptical square ringed with outdoor cafes and the Baroque fountain of Hercules; the daily social hub of Udine's relaxed Friulian lifestyle

things.name: Cividale del Friuli
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Lombard city 18km east of Udine with the extraordinary 8th-century Tempietto Longobardo and remarkable Lombard artifacts

things.name: Prosecco Hills Day Trip
things.description: The UNESCO-listed Prosecco wine hills of Conegliano-Valdobbiadene are accessible for a day trip; tastings in ancient stone wineries amid vine-terraced slopes

things.name: Stadio Friuli (Dacia Arena)
things.description: Modern 25,144-seat home of Udinese Calcio, who qualified for the UEFA Europa League and have a proud history in Italian football
